# mtncloud_job (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud job by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_job" "nightly" {
  name = "nightly-maintenance"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the job to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the job is enabled.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the job.
- `instance_label` (String) Instance label targeted by the job, if any.
- `target_type` (String) Target type used by the job.
- `task_id` (Number) ID of the task the job runs, if any.
- `workflow_id` (Number) ID of the workflow the job runs, if any.
